name: 5-10-5 Pro Agility
instructions: Complete a full 5-10-5 shuttle.
Record each timed attempt.
coachingNotes: Use the same surface and setup each time.

name: 10-Yard Sprint
instructions: Sprint ten yards from a consistent start.
Record each attempt.
coachingNotes: Run through the finish.
safetyNotes: Allow enough space to slow down.
motivationalCue: Win the first three steps cleanly.

name: Broad Jump
instructions: Jump forward from two feet.
Measure heel position on landing.
coachingNotes: Stick the landing.
safetyNotes: Land on a clear, forgiving surface.
motivationalCue: Jump strong and stick the landing.

name: 50-Shot Target Hits
instructions: Take 50 shots at called targets.
Record successful target hits.
coachingNotes: Use the same distance each test.
safetyNotes: Use a secured net or shooting tarp.
motivationalCue: Pick the target before the release.

name: Puck-Control Weave
instructions: Set cones or markers only if a clear, safe area is available.
Weave through the same course each time.
Record clean timed attempts only.
If safe space is unavailable, defer operationally and do not force a numeric result.
coachingNotes: Only count clean runs.
The current app saves numeric KPI results only, so use notes for context but do not force a score when space is unavailable.
safetyNotes: Use a clear area with no slipping or tripping hazards.

name: Head-Up Callout %
instructions: Stickhandle for 45 seconds.
Record correct visual callouts.
coachingNotes: Keep callout pace consistent.
motivationalCue: See the cue without losing the puck.

name: 30-Second Quick Hands Touch Count
instructions: Stickhandle for 30 seconds using the same setup.
Count clean controlled touches.
coachingNotes: Use the same puck or ball and stance each time.

name: Plank Quality
instructions: Hold a strong plank with a straight body line.
Stop when position quality can no longer be maintained.
coachingNotes: Quality matters more than maximum time.
safetyNotes: Stop for back, shoulder, or wrist pain.

name: 100m Sprint
instructions: Use a flat safe area measured to 100m.
Start from a consistent standing start.
Record each timed attempt.
coachingNotes: Run through the finish and allow full recovery between attempts.
safetyNotes: Complete a full warm-up. Stop for pain and avoid slippery or crowded surfaces.

name: 45-Second Hockey Shift Shuttle
instructions: Mark two lines 10 metres apart on a flat, dry, non-slip surface.
Set a timer for 45 seconds and have a parent or coach time and count.
Start behind Line A. On go, move to Line B, cross or touch the line, turn safely, and return.
Continue for 45 seconds. Count each completed 10m length.
At 45 seconds, measure the remaining partial final length in metres with a measuring tape.
Enter total distance in metres: completed 10m lengths x 10 plus partial final metres.
coachingNotes: Purpose: measure repeated acceleration, deceleration, turn quality, and short-shift work capacity.
Example: 10 completed lengths plus 0.73m partial final distance = 100.73m.
Use the same 10m setup and scoring formula for every retest.
safetyNotes: Warm up first. Use a clear, flat, dry surface. Stop if pain, slipping, dizziness, or form breaks down. Prioritize controlled turns over reckless cutting.

name: Push-Up Test
instructions: Use strict form with a straight body line.
Use a controlled tempo.
Stop when form breaks and record completed reps.
coachingNotes: Quality over quantity.
Do not count reps after body position breaks.
safetyNotes: Stop for wrist, shoulder, elbow, or back pain.

name: Flexed-Arm Hang
instructions: Use a stable pull-up bar with adult supervision.
Start with chin above the bar in a controlled flexed-arm position.
Start the timer when support is removed.
Stop when the chin drops below the bar, grip fails, swinging becomes excessive, or pain occurs.
coachingNotes: No kipping or swinging.
Use the same bar and setup each time.
safetyNotes: Adult supervision required. Use a secure bar and safe landing area. Stop for shoulder, elbow, wrist, or grip pain.

name: Zwift Bike 3x10s Peak Power
instructions: Use a bike mounted to Wahoo KICKR CORE, KICKR CORE 2, or equivalent smart trainer that reports watts.
Open Zwift and pair the trainer as Power Source and Controllable. Pair cadence if available and Zwift Click if using virtual shifting.
Use Free Ride, not ERG workout mode. Choose a flat route such as Tempus Fugit in Watopia if available.
Warm up 8 minutes easy.
Sprint 1: 10 seconds hard and record peak watts.
Easy spin 2 minutes.
Sprint 2: 10 seconds hard and record peak watts.
Easy spin 2 minutes.
Sprint 3: 10 seconds hard and record peak watts.
Cool down 3 to 5 minutes easy.
coachingNotes: Use the same trainer, bike, route, and approximate starting virtual gear each retest.
If a virtual gear is recorded, use the same gear next time.
Do not compare directly to outdoor rides or different bikes/trainers.
safetyNotes: Bike must be securely mounted. Use fan and water. Stop if pain, dizziness, unusual discomfort, or unstable setup occurs. Do not force an all-out sprint if setup feels unstable.

name: Vertical Jump
instructions: Use a consistent standing vertical jump setup.
Jump from two feet and land under control.
Record the best measured jump.
coachingNotes: Use the same measurement method each time.
Stick the landing before the next attempt.
safetyNotes: Use a safe landing area. Stop for knee, ankle, hip, or back pain.
